title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on National Maritime Day
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on National Maritime Day

Your professionalism and courage have played a crucial role in steering the nation’s growth

Posted On:
05 APR 2026 12:57PM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah extended his greetings to the personnel of India’s maritime sector on the occasion of National Maritime Day.

In a post on X, Shri Amit Shah said, “Greetings to the personnel of India’s maritime sector on National Maritime Day. Your professionalism and courage have played a crucial role in steering the nation’s growth, whether in peacetime or during trying times. The nation salutes your commitment.”

Greetings to the personnel of India’s maritime sector on
#NationalMaritimeDay
.
Your professionalism and courage have played a crucial role in steering the nation’s growth, whether in peacetime or during trying times. The nation salutes your commitment.
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
April 5, 2026

*****

RK/PR/PS/SK

(Release ID: 2249101)
